description: This pipeline appears to be designed for image and data processing, specifically for exporting images and tables in various formats. It takes in multiple input images, performs various operations on them, including overlaying and colocalization analysis, and then exports the results as images or tables. The pipeline seems to handle different types of images and data, including 2D and 3D images, and supports export to formats such as PNG, JPEG, BMP, AVI, TIFF, CSV, and XLSX. Overall, the pipeline aims to facilitate the processing and analysis of biomedical microscopic images and provide the results in a usable format.

a119c31c-4abb-469a-92fb-a1aadf48dfc6.name: iji-export-image-v2
a119c31c-4abb-469a-92fb-a1aadf48dfc6.description:
Exports incoming images into a non-JIPipe format (PNG, JPEG, BMP, AVI, TIFF). Please note support for input images depending on the file format:
  • PNG, JPEG, BMP: 2D images only
  • AVI: 2D or 3D images only
  • TIFF: All images supported


This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
